message:
fix: Add table version caching and update Playwright to 1.57.0

- Add hasTableWithVersion() method for proper caching checks
- Use version-based caching in executeWasmSqlFull to skip re-registration
- Update Playwright container from v1.52.0 to v1.57.0 to match package version
- This fixes CI browser tests which were failing due to version mismatch

files.patch:
@@ -90,7 +90,7 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     needs: unit-tests
     container:
-      image: mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.52.0-noble
+      image: mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.57.0-noble
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
